---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the scaffold
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or gap this would address. Concrete use cases help.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Is this scaffold-level or app-level?

The scaffold intentionally leaves personality logic as stubs (`prompt_builder.py`, `reflection/engine.py`) for you to implement. If this feature is specific to one type of companion app rather than the infrastructure, it may be out of scope.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, mockups, or anything else that would help evaluate the request.
